Package neqsim.process.safety.processsafetysystem

Class ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.processsafetysystem.ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem extends Object implements Serializable
One process safety function, final element, protection layer, or evidence record in a Clause 10 review.

The class is map-backed so C&E extracts, SRS tables, PSV lists, instrument data, STID/P&ID evidence, and tagreader summaries can be normalized outside the Java core and evaluated by a deterministic standards engine.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors
See Also:
